allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\DESKTOP\\Arivechi-v2"; $output = & npm run build 2>&1; $output | Out-File -FilePath "build.log" -Encoding utf8; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content "build.log" | Select-Object -Last 80)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\DESKTOP\\Arivechi-v2"; "--- build.log size ---"; \(Get-Item "build.log"\).Length; "--- build.log content ---"; Get-Content "build.log" -Raw; "--- .next exists? ---"; Test-Path ".next"; if \(Test-Path ".next"\) { Get-ChildItem ".next" | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize })
PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\DESKTOP\\Arivechi-v2"; "--- via npx ---"; $out = npx --no next build 2>&1 | Out-String; $out; "--- EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE ---"; "--- .next now? ---"; Test-Path ".next")

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\DESKTOP\\Arivechi-v2"; "--- direct node invocation ---"; node "./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next" build 2>&1 | Out-String; "--- EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE ---"; "--- .next? ---"; Test-Path ".next")
PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "listening on 3000 \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "NOT listening" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "OK listening on 3000 \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "DOWN - port 3000 not listening" })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force } catch {} }; "port-cleared")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Write-Output '=== theme-main.js ==='; $tm=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://arivechi.transparenciasonora.org/wp-content/themes/municipios_wp/assets/js/theme-main.js?ver=1.0.10' -UseBasicParsing; \($tm.Content -split "`n"\) | Select-String -Pattern 'ajax|fetch|XMLHttpRequest|wp-json|\\.php|admin-ajax|arrayA|arrayT|documento' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 50 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $urls = @\('https://arivechi.transparenciasonora.org/documento/?id=288&if=286&t=Todos&a=2026','https://arivechi.transparenciasonora.org/documento/?id=288&if=286&t=Todos&a=2025','https://arivechi.transparenciasonora.org/documento/?id=288&if=286&t=Todos&a=Todos','https://arivechi.transparenciasonora.org/documento/?id=287&if=285&t=Todos&a=Todos'\); foreach\($u in $urls\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing; $pdfs=[regex]::Matches\($r.Content,'https?://[^\\s\\"''<>]+\\.pdf'\) | ForEach-Object {$_.Value} | Select-Object -Unique; Write-Output \('=== ' + $u + ' \(len=' + $r.Content.Length + '\) ==='\); $pdfs } catch { Write-Output \('ERROR ' + $u + ': ' + $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \('Status: ' + $r.StatusCode + ' — Server activo'\) } catch { Write-Output \('Sin servidor en localhost:3000 — ' + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/transparencia/sevac' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 25; Write-Output \('Status: ' + $r.StatusCode + ' — OK len=' + $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \('Error: ' + $_.Exception.Message\) })
